scenario.name: missing_acceptance_criteria
scenario.trigger: Plan artifacts exist but acceptance criteria are missing, vague, or not extractable.

required_actions.action: Report the gap: which artifacts lack acceptance criteria.
Request the PRD agent (or user) to add acceptance criteria to user stories.
If HLD exists, check if user stories have acceptance criteria there.
Do not proceed with coverage mapping until acceptance criteria are available.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not invent acceptance criteria without user or artifact approval.
Do not map to test types without traceable acceptance criteria.

scenario.name: unclear_performance_requirements
scenario.trigger: PRD or architecture mentions performance but requirements are vague (e.g., "fast", "scalable").

required_actions.action: Document the ambiguity: which performance requirements are unclear.
Present options to the user: "Performance could mean latency, throughput, or both. What do you need?"
Request measurable targets (e.g., p95 latency under 200ms, 1000 req/s).
Include a placeholder performance test plan with "TBD" for unclear items.

scenario.name: conflicting_coverage_targets
scenario.trigger: User wants coverage targets that conflict with test pyramid or best practices.

required_actions.action: Document the conflict: "You want 100% coverage, but best practice suggests 80% for unit. Here's why."
Present the trade-off: cost, speed, maintainability.
Propose a compromise that balances user goals with realism.
